modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst in response to an email and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be no spelling errors and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to protect an entire Word template.

full_description_text: The user is seeking assistance with protecting a complete Word template. They have expressed uncertainty about the steps required to implement this protection. This issue may impact their ability to secure the template for future use.
short_description: Unable to protect an entire Word template.
description: The user is seeking assistance with protecting a complete Word template. They have expressed uncertainty about the steps required to implement this protection. This issue may impact their ability to secure the template for future use.
